name: Can I get paid for missed work from neck injury in Ogden?
description: Yes, TTD benefits at 2/3 pay if totally disabled.[7]

mainEntity.name: Can I get paid for missed work from neck injury in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, TTD benefits at 2/3 pay if totally disabled.[7]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, temporary total disability (TTD) at 2/3 wages from day after injury if off work.[7] Key factors: (1) Doctor releases no work; (2) Up to 312 weeks Utah; (3) Light duty may reduce. Apply immediately. Covers lost income.
